channel.title: Sam Altman / @sama
channel.description: Twitter feed for: @sama. Generated by https://nitter.net

item.title:
chatgpt has gotten soooo much better with the latest update.
really proud of the team for this one.
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
chatgpt has gotten soooo much better with the latest update.

really proud of the team for this one.

item.title:
ChatGPT Images 2.0 💚 India.
Already more than 1 billion images created there; awesome to see.
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
ChatGPT Images 2.0 💚 India.

Already more than 1 billion images created there; awesome to see.

item.title: i appreciate how seriously the team always takes these reports (even when the answer turns out to be 'i got used to the current level of magic and now i'd like more please')
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
i appreciate how seriously the team always takes these reports (even when the answer turns out to be 'i got used to the current level of magic and now i'd like more please')

Tibo (@thsottiaux)

Codex team is aware of reports of GPT-5.5 performing worse for some users and investigating. We don't have anything conclusive yet and systems are healthy but we will share updates as we go.

— https://nitter.net/thsottiaux/status/2055316274394300829#m

item.title:
RT by @sama: A preview for Pro users: a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT.
Pro users in the U.S. can securely connect financial accounts, see where their money is going, and ask questions based on the information they choose to connect.
Your full financial picture, now in ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: @ChatGPTapp
item.description:
A preview for Pro users: a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT.

Pro users in the U.S. can securely connect financial accounts, see where their money is going, and ask questions based on the information they choose to connect.

Your full financial picture, now in ChatGPT.


Video

item.title: also all this:
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
also all this:

OpenAI Developers (@OpenAIDevs)

Codex is getting easier to automate and customize around your code.

🪝 Hooks customize the Codex loop with scripts that run at key points in a task:
• Run validators before or after work
• Scan prompts for secrets
• Log conversations to internal systems
• Create memories or customize behavior by repo or directory

⚙️ Programmatic access tokens provide scoped credentials for Business and Enterprise teams:
• Create tokens from ChatGPT workspace settings
• Use them in CI, release workflows, and internal automations
• Set expirations or revoke access when needed
• Keep usage tied back to the workspace


Video

— https://nitter.net/OpenAIDevs/status/2055032115964870838#m

item.title: Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app!
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description: Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app!

item.title: being a dad is the thing that has most exceeded already-high-expectations in my whole life
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description: being a dad is the thing that has most exceeded already-high-expectations in my whole life

item.title:
i get some anxiety not using the smartest-available model/settings.
but sometimes i dont mind if it's really slow.
i wonder if we should focus more on a price/speed tradeoff relative to a price/intelligence tradeoff.
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
i get some anxiety not using the smartest-available model/settings.

but sometimes i dont mind if it's really slow.

i wonder if we should focus more on a price/speed tradeoff relative to a price/intelligence tradeoff.

item.title:
codex is the best AI coding product and we want to make it easy to try.
for the next 30 days, we are giving companies that want to try switching over two months of free codex usage.
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
codex is the best AI coding product and we want to make it easy to try.

for the next 30 days, we are giving companies that want to try switching over two months of free codex usage.

item.title: speaking of things that have gotten over a threshold for me, the combo of the new ChatGPT model, personality, and personalization feels like a new thing
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description: speaking of things that have gotten over a threshold for me, the combo of the new ChatGPT model, personality, and personalization feels like a new thing

item.title:
would you call it
a superapp?
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
would you call it

a superapp?

Rex Sorgatz (@fimoculous)

After being a Claude Code devotee for a year, I finally tried Codex on a new project this weekend. Once again, in the matter of a few months, it feels like the world changed.

I can see myself doing *everything* inside of Codex this week.

— https://nitter.net/fimoculous/status/2053817882631352490#m

item.title:
OpenAI is launching Daybreak, our effort to accelerate cyber defense and continuously secure software.
AI is already good and about to get super good at cybersecurity; we'd like to start working with as many companies as possible now to help them continuously secure themselves.
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
OpenAI is launching Daybreak, our effort to accelerate cyber defense and continuously secure software.

AI is already good and about to get super good at cybersecurity; we'd like to start working with as many companies as possible now to help them continuously secure themselves.

item.title:
R to @sama: Please get in touch if this sounds interesting!
https://openai.com/daybreak/
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
Please get in touch if this sounds interesting!

openai.com/daybreak/

item.title:
RT by @sama: Introducing the OpenAI Deployment Company, which will help businesses maximally succeed with their deployments of AI.
Starting with 150 Forward Deployed Engineers and Deployment Specialists, and $4 billion of initial investment from 19 partners.
item.dc:creator: @gdb
item.description:
Introducing the OpenAI Deployment Company, which will help businesses maximally succeed with their deployments of AI.

Starting with 150 Forward Deployed Engineers and Deployment Specialists, and $4 billion of initial investment from 19 partners.

OpenAI (@OpenAI)

Today we’re launching the OpenAI Deployment Company to help businesses build and deploy AI.

It's majority-owned and controlled by OpenAI. It brings together 19 leading investment firms, consultancies, and system integrators to help organizations deploy frontier AI to production for business impact. openai.com/index/openai-laun…

— https://nitter.net/OpenAI/status/2053824997777457651#m

item.title:
what if we name the next model "goblin"
almost worth it to make you all happy...
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
what if we name the next model "goblin"

almost worth it to make you all happy...

item.title: RT by @sama: What he talks about couldn't have happened before GPT-5.5
item.dc:creator: @SebastienBubeck
item.description: What he talks about couldn't have happened before GPT-5.5

item.title: interesting
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
interesting

Chris (@chatgpt21)

Codex made me money without me doing anything..

Huge turning point for me today, I asked Codex to go off and make me $5. It went out, found a small open-source security/audit bounty path, made a legit PR, followed up with the maintainer, kept my payment details private - (without me asking), handled the GitHub proof/verification loop, and got the work merged.

it spent about 22 hours working on multiple security audits.

Today I received my first payment from that experiment: $16.88.

That’s a $506.40/month run-rate if repeated daily.

Not life-changing money yet, but it's deeply exciting to live out Sam Altman's vision for AI, where it will just go out and make money for you. It's awesome to start to see the beginning of that.

— https://nitter.net/chatgpt21/status/2053556436475461786#m

item.title:
5.5 is an autistic genius with very strange taste in naming
shocking that we would make such a thing
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description:
5.5 is an autistic genius with very strange taste in naming

shocking that we would make such a thing

item.title: R to @sama: autistic genius intelligence
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description: autistic genius intelligence

item.title: kicking off a bunch of codex tasks, running around with my kid in the sunshine, and then coming back at naptime to find them all completed makes me very optimistic for the future
item.dc:creator: @sama
item.description: kicking off a bunch of codex tasks, running around with my kid in the sunshine, and then coming back at naptime to find them all completed makes me very optimistic for the future
